message:
fix(fr-command): align INFO clients section with upstream field names [bd-frankenredis-infoclients]

INFO clients was emitting fr-coined names that don't match upstream
Redis 7.2 server.c::genRedisInfoString:

  - 'total_blocking_clients' → 'total_blocking_keys'
  - 'total_blocking_clients_on_nokey' → 'total_blocking_keys_on_nokey'
  - dropped 'total_clients_connected_including_replicas' (not in
    upstream)
  - added 'pubsub_clients:0' + 'watching_clients:0' (always
    emitted upstream)

Tools that parse INFO by field name (redis_exporter, RedisInsight,
custom Grafana dashboards) will see the upstream-correct metric
names.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
